zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Pepper於1505年1月11日出生在英國越可爾利德斯時，她的父親William Peppers46歲，母親Joanna Downer31歲。她於1527年1月10日與Robert Roger Bland在英國越可爾利德斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1574年7月21日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉林霍爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可哈普斯亞德 聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Pepper于1505年1月11日出生在英国越可爾利德斯时，她的父亲William Peppers46岁，母亲Joanna Downer31岁。她于1527年1月10日与Robert Roger Bland在英国越可爾利德斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1574年7月21日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉林霍爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可哈普斯亞德 聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: Pepper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and North German: from Middle English peper, piper, Middle Low German peper ‘pepper’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a spicer; alternatively, it may be a nickname for a small man (as if the size of a peppercorn) or one with a fiery temper, or for a dark-haired man (from the color of a peppercorn) or anecdotal for someone who paid a peppercorn rent.
Americanized form of Jewish Pfeffer , Feffer or Fefer, all meaning ‘pepper’.

variants.name: Peppard
meanings: Irish and English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French pipart, pippart ‘piper’, a derivative of Old French piper, Anglo-Norman French pipper ‘to play the pipe(s) or flute’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 12th century and is associated particularly with County Louth.

variants.name: Paper
meanings: English: probably a variant of Pepper . Paper is a variant of Middle English peper ‘pepper’, which is probably also a shortened form of Pepperer ‘seller of pepper’.
Swiss German: variant of Papper, probably from baby talk. Compare Paben .

variants.name: Peper
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Bernhard, Ewald, Leonhard, Reinhold, Udo.
North German, Jewish (Ashkenazic) and English: variant of   Pepper  .
Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a spicer, from Middle Dutch pe(e)per ‘pepper’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Pepper was born on 11 January 1505, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Peppers, was 46 and her mother, Joanna Downer, was 31. She married Robert Roger Bland on 10 January 1527, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 21 July 1574, in Killingholme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Hampstead St John, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Pepper est née le 11 janvier 1505, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Peppers, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joanna Downer, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Roger Bland le 10 janvier 1527, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 juillet 1574, à Killingholme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Hampstead St John, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Pepper am 11. Januar 1505 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Peppers 46 und ihre Mutter Joanna Downer 31. Sie hat am 10. Januar 1527 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England Robert Roger Bland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 21. Juli 1574 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Killingholme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hampstead St John, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pepper è nata il il 11 gennaio 1505 nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Peppers, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Joanna Downer, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Robert Roger Bland il 10 gennaio 1527, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 luglio 1574, nel Killingholme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Hampstead St John, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Pepperが1505年1月11日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで生まれた時，父William Peppersは46歳，母Joanna Downerは31歳であった。1527年1月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズでRobert Roger Blandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1574年7月21日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキリングhオルメで69歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスハンプステアド スト ジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Pepper(이)가 1505년 1월 11일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Peppers(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Downer(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1527년 1월 10일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 Robert Roger Bland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 킬링홀에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 함프스테아드 스트 존에 묻혔다.

pt.11 January 1505–21 Jul 1574: 11 de janeiro de 1505–21 de julho de 1574
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pepper nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1505, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Peppers, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Downer, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Roger Bland em 10 de janeiro de 1527, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 21 de julho de 1574, em Killingholme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Hampstead St John, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Pepper родилась 11 января 1505 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Peppers было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Downer, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Roger Bland 10 января 1527 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 21 июля 1574 г. в местности киллингхолм, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности хампстид ст джон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.11 January 1505–21 Jul 1574: 11 de enero de 1505–21 de julio de 1574
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Pepper nació el 11 de enero de 1505, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Peppers, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joanna Downer, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Robert Roger Bland el 10 de enero de 1527, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de julio de 1574, en Killingholme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Hampstead St John, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
